ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price return record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the return is for */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the price returns are calculated */,
  "one_month_return" REAL /* Price return for the past one month */,
  "three_month_return" REAL /* Price return for the past three months */,
  "six_month_return" REAL /* Price return for the past six months */,
  "ytd_return" REAL /* Year-to-date price return */,
  "one_year_return" REAL /* Price return for the past one year */,
  "two_year_return" REAL /* Price return for the past two years */,
  "five_year_return" REAL /* Price return for the past five years */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock for the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_returns_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio-stock record */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the stock is in */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "allocation" REAL /* Allocation percentage of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stock was added to the portfolio */,
  "removed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the stock was removed from the portfolio (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., investor, analyst, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert is for (if applicable) */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the alert is for (if applicable) */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  "published_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the news article was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)
